programme.title: The Delta Force
programme.desc: Political extremists have taken innocent people hostage…and only super-soldiers Chuck Norris, Lee Marvin and The Delta Force can rescue them in this explosive adventure filled with wall-to-wall action! Martin Balsam and Shelley Winters also star.

programme.title: Firewalker
programme.desc: Two hapless soldiers of misfortune (Chuck Norris, Louis Gossett Jr.) meet a beautiful girl (Melody Anderson) with a map to a lost gold mine and decide to have one last shot at striking it rich. But the trail to the treasure is no yellow brick road!

programme.title: Braddock: Missing In Action III
programme.desc: When Colonel James Braddock (Chuck Norris, "Missing in Action") is told that his wife and 12-year-old son are still alive in Communist Vietnam, he mounts a one-man assault to free them…armed with the latest high-tech firepower, of course!

programme.title: Delta Force 2: The Colombian Connection
programme.desc: Chuck Norris is in peak form in this explosive action/adventure that brings back one of his most unforgettable characters, Delta Force Colonel Scott McCoy, for a daring mission to destroy a deadly drug cartel led by the ruthless Billy Drago!

programme.title: American Ninja
programme.desc: Michael Dudikoff stars as Joe Armstrong, a one-man fighting machine. Serving in the army to avoid prison, Joe finds himself battling the deadly Black Star Order, as well as corrupt military leaders in order to bring down an illegal arms sale.

programme.title: American Ninja 2: The Confrontation
programme.desc: On a remote Caribbean island, Army Ranger Joe Armstrong saves an old friend from the clutches of "The Lion," an evil super-criminal who has kidnapped a local scientist and mass-produced an army of mutant Ninja warriors.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators are baffled after finding a murder scene devoid of any physical evidence, but they suspect that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime. If so, forensic scientists would have to find some way to learn what the dog had seen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: One warm summer afternoon, the town of Verona, Wisconsin faced its first triple homicide. To solve the case, investigators had to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The 1987 disappearance of Houston resident Tracy Jo Shine is recalled. The investigation went cold until 2000 when a "cold case squad" learned that the woman's ex-boyfriend Michael Neal had bragged about killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Scott Dunn goes missing, police spray his bedroom with Luminol and uncover a scene of horrific violence. Now investigators face a daunting task: proving that Scott Dunn had been murdered without a body, a witness or a murder weapon.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this episode, the decade-old murder of a young Texas housewife is investigated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, Dorothy Donovan was murdered in her Dover, Delaware home. When her son stated that she was murdered by a hitchhiker he had picked up, police were skeptical.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two different men called police to report the same murder. Apparently, neither one knew that the other had called. The investigation uncovered even more unusual circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, police received a call from Darlie Routier telling them of her two sons' murders. The police found the killer by analyzing blood spatter, doing behavioral profiling and analyzing Darlie's 911 call.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The investigation into the kidnapping and rape of an 18-year-old Ohio woman is aided when the victim returns hours after the incident occurred. With her help, the police are able to track the assailant to his front door.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When heart surgeon Darryl Sutorius is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home, police assume he committed suicide. Further investigation reveals that his new wife Della has a history of violence and an insatiable desire for money.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, Palm Beach waitress Denise O'Neill is abducted and murdered. Her neighbor Luis Caballero arouses suspicions by behaving oddly toward TV crews covering the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In a 1992 murder case, the autopsy of a cremated body turns up telltale clues of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The woman was dead. The man had been shot four times and survived. When the man's version of events contradicted physical evidence, investigators turned to forensic science to paint a clearer picture of the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was one of the most brazen crimes of the 20th century. Adolph Coors III, chairman of the Coors Brewing Company, was kidnapped and held for ransom. The crime prompted one of the most intense manhunts in United States history.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone or if she was the victim of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When investigators found Bruce Miller dead in the office of his junkyard business, the crime scene was almost pristine. But when a computer forensics expert examined computers owned by the victim's wife and her lover, he found all the evidence needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the 1980s, a trio of unsolved murders occurred in Wichita Falls, Texas. Later, a fourth murder from the same time period provided the police with far more than they realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After 10 bodies turn up in Florida, one victim — 17-year-old Lisa McVey — is abducted but released. She leads police to the perpertrator, Bobbie Joe Long.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Trace
programme.desc: After being admitted to the hospital with unexplained bleeding, 11-month-old Chad Shelton dies. Investigators and scientists frantically search for a cause when others from the same house fall ill.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young fireman died from what appeared to be serious but undiagnosed heart disease, his family and friends had no proof of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: An investigation of a pediatrician, prompted by the mysterious death of one of her patients, leads to a Texas hospital where the pediatric mortality rate is higher than at any hospital in the country.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a street fight takes the life of a national wrestling champion, police must determine if he was killed in cold blood or in self-defense.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two boys are brutally attacked, investigators rely on evidence fished out of a nearby pond. It became the first case where diatom analysis was used to place a suspect at the scene of the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a mini-vacation in Key West. The wife went missing and police searched every square inch of the island; they found nothing but a pair of sandals which might have belonged to her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A wealthy man and his wife were attacked by three masked men outside their luxurious Louisiana home. He was shot dead and she was forced to open their hidden safe. To solve the crime, police would have to find out who knew about the concealed safe.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police are led on a wild goose chase when the wife of a prominent banker is kidnapped. An entomologist's unexpected discovery leads to a new suspect — and the realization that ordinary office equipment can leave extraordinary clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2007, Brian and Beverly Mauck were found dead in their Graham, Washington home. Using a bloody palm print and shoe prints at the scene, investigators focus their attention on Daniel Tavares, who had previously inked a tattoo on Brian's back.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.desc: When the Ninja receive an invitation to partake in the Tournament of Elements and a clue that Zane might be alive, they accept and travel to a Lost Island owned by notorious crime lord Master Chen in order to save their friend.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: On the island, Lloyd learns that his father used to train under the deceitful Master Chen and when the Ninja meet the playfully deceitful ruler, they realize they are in a tournament where “Only one can remain.”

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In order find Zane, the Ninja stay in the tournament to get past the first round but Chen complicates things by changing the bracket and pitting Jay against Cole.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Chen pits everyone against each other in a ludicrous roller skating event called Thunderblade and all contestants team up against the Ninja.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja have a secret alliance of elemental fighters, Cole has found Zane and Nya is a spy within Chen’s Kabuki to figure out what nefarious plot Chen is up to.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Nya has proof of Chen’s plan but he entices the contestants to hunt her down with promises to advance the winner, forcing the Ninja in a race to get to her first.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: Cragger tricks Laval into withholding CHI from the Crocodile tribe. This reignites the hostilities between the Lions and Crocodiles. Laval must frantically escape the wrath of the Crocs and somehow get rid of the CHI before his father finds out.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: Laval and Eris take a Lion tank for a ride around Chima. But it may not be such a good idea. During their trip, they discover that Cragger has employed a tribe of beavers in an elaborate plot to steal all the Chi.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelúzín se roba un paquete de la puerta de Don Sebas, volteando a todo el edificio de cabeza, mientras Jonathan, cansado del bullying del Abuelo decide darle una lección.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: LFDB decide hacerle una intervención al Abuelo porque está mas hostil que nunca y quieren que busque tratamiento médico, mientras que Peluzín y Jonathan ayudan a Pitipú a conseguir su nacionalidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño bebé aparece en la puerta de LFDB, quien viene acarreando una ola de destrucción. Ahora la salvación del mundo depende de la Familia del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo consigue una ocupación donde se siente como pez en el agua, mientras que Peluzín entra en un proyecto experimental que le traerá muchos problemas a todos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar encuentra por fin el amor de manera inesperada mientras que el Pasita, triste por las limitaciones de su edad avanzada consigue la receta para la eterna juventud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra"

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El calentamiento global trae consigo una mueva amenaza para la ciudad, mientras que Irma y Peluzín emprenden en un nuevo negocio, reclutando a varios amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan y Gaspar buscan darle una lección al Abuelo en en Día del Padre, mientras que el Noruego se siente que no es valorado por Olaf y junto con Peluzín deciden tomar cartas en el asunto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa un con Genio quien le conceda varios deseos, mientras que el Noruego decide lanzarle una fiesta sorpresa de cumpleaños a Olaf para que recupere su infancia perdida.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La compañía donde trabaja Gaspar atraviesa un recorte de personal pero el es de los pocos afortunados que se salva y es mandado a una capacitación a Estados Unidos, mientras que Peluzín toma el papel de Gaspar en México.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar atraviesa una crisis en su periodo de entrenamiento en Estados Unidos, mientras que el resto de la familia decide alcanzar a Gaspar

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego sigue con su plan de casarse con la Ivanka de cera, mientras que el Abuelo y Peluzín afianzan su relación después de su gran viaje

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Probing an anti-Semitic shooting spree at a posh fund-raiser, Briscoe and Curtis unearth more-personal motives.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A delivery man's route leads detectives to his killers; prosecutors try to strike a deal when a confession is protected in the name of religion.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives follow the trail of a stolen credit card to locate two teens they suspect may have killed their newborn baby.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis crack a killing ring during the investigation of a Navy officer's murder; McCoy and Ross fight for prosecution authority.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Prosecutors question a gunman's culpability when a medical report on the victim of a drive-by shooting raises suspicions about a doctor.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A deadly robbery leads to a suburban militia; McCoy questions his safety when he faces the group leader in court.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A teen model's death leads Briscoe and Curtis to her parents in Baltimore; there they enlist detectives Munch and Falsone. (Concluding on "Homicide: Life on the Street.")

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Curtis investigate a new mother's death and the disappearance of her baby, leading prosecutors to probe the husband's role in the affair.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A bail bondsman's death leads detectives to a corrupt lawyer with a connection to the district attorney's office.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A killer's confession prompts detectives to reopen a deadly arson case involving a family with ties to Schiff.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A visiting doctor, thought to be a terrorist, becomes a suspect in the death of an Egyptian man; Ross learns the doctor specializes in female circumcision.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: An accident that kills three people hits close to home for Curtis and brings back painful memories for McCoy.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A forensic specialist is targeted by killers, challenging Briscoe and Curtis to find a suspect; McCoy and Ross turn up evidence on the victim.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives search for the killer of a physician who had a dangerous sex life; an attorney maintains murders are a result of too much television.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Detectives seek a motive for a man's brutal beating; Ross uncovers an unlikely accomplice in the assault case.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives link a dead FBI witness to an overeager hit man and a gangster; Schiff pushes to prosecute the mob for the murder.

programme.desc: When a company that owes money to Charles becomes bankrupt, Charlies ends up deep in debt and puts a lot of financial strain on the family.

programme.desc: The town gathers for a baseball match between the Green-Stockings of Sleepy Eye and the men of Walnut Grove.

programme.desc: Laura and Mary's plans to raise money for the pastor's birthday by investing the Sunday-school funds backfire.

programme.desc: Isaiah Edwards attempts to bond with his newly adopted son and buys him a rifle so that the pair can go hunting together; his son, an avid reader, has no interest in hunting.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A voice-recording device broadcasts Laura's love for a new boy (Eric Shea) all over town.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #11 The Columbus Files
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko are after the mysterious treasure known only as Columbus' Egg. Fujiko was able to memorize the Egg's location, but when she's attacked and loses her memory, all seems lost. No one else knows where it is. What's a thief to do?

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #12 Missed by a Dollar
programme.desc: At an auction in New York, attendees are shocked when a mysterious man bids $1,000,000 on a plain diamond ring. The man himself is even more astounded when the President of the World Bank outbids him by a single dollar. The man is Lupin!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Inspector Zenigata arrives in San Marino after receiving a note from Lupin III. Instead of a declaration of a new theft, it's a wedding invitation.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Marlow Brozzi, a soccer player from San Marino. A mafia member has proof that Brozzi is cheating so Brozzi approaches Lupin for help.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin and the gang managed to steal a fragment of Marie Antoinette's necklace, but Jigen has been captured by Nyx.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: A toothache prompts Jigen to rush to a clinic in a ruined town. The doctor, Livia, says she'll only take a look at him if he'll let her hold on to his gun, so he has no choice but to hand it over.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Fujiko Mine is seen with the members of a failing circus troupe. A former member of the troupe, Tony Belacastro, known as the Magician, died ten years ago, but the secrets to his magic are written in his "Trick Recipes."

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: The widow Elena is the only one who knows where her late husband hid his fortune. Zenigata shows up to protect her from Lupin's gang, who are out to steal it from her. Zenigata and Elena go to her mountain retreat to hide from Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Nyx, Agent MI6 of the British Secret Service, values his wife and daughters above all others, so he keeps his identity as MI6 a secret from them. However, one of his daughters is kidnapped by some mysterious men.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: An eerie old castle converted to a hotel, known as the "The Mansion of the Cursed Bride," where the ghost of a bride is said to appear. It's said that a priceless treasure rests in the hotel, so Lupin and the gang pay a visit.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Long ago a dictator was assassinated, and the assassins involved were later killed one by one. Goemon was one of those involved in the assassination. A former bodyguard of the assassinated dictator, the legendary sniper Zora, might be out for revenge...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is invited by both Fujiko and Rebecca to a couples-only wine auction party. Both women have their sights on the same thing: The Lovesick Pig, a legendary wine appearing in the auction.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Rebecca is kidnapped and Lupin must rescue her! Before she was kidnapped, Rebecca had been deciphering a book left behind by a genius scientist, and MI6 made the mysterious comment that it was the "Dream of Italy."

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin finally deciphers the book left behind by the genius scientist Uraga, and then mysteriously falls asleep. He ends up in a world where it's impossible to tell whether what he sees is a dream or reality. Is this the "Dream of Italy"?!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin has been arrested and imprisoned. He's tried everything he could to escape, but Zenigata stops him every time. Zenigata then sends Lupin to an even higher-security prison, just to be on the safe side. Has the end of Lupin III has come at last?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin is so broke that he doesn't know what he'll eat tomorrow, so he concocts a plan to steal the Mona Lisa. But the Mona Lisa won't be easy to steal. He does his best to weave through the security net Zenigata has set.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Like a she-devil, the diamond "Cleopatra's Soul" is constantly changing owners. In search of the diamond, Lupin arrives at what appears to be an ordinary school...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Lupin, Jigen, and Goemon decide to go eat some tasty sushi, but when they hop in the car to leave, they find a dog inside. Lupin promises to drop the dog off with Fujiko while they're out getting sushi.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: Greco is a man revered as a savior for defeating evildoers one after another. Everyone Greco targets die within 24 hours, killing and being killed by their own comrades. When provoked by Greco, Lupin and the gang head to Greco's church.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: A mysterious portrait of Lupin appears at a major fashion show in Milan. When it's determined that the portraits have been painted by Leonardo Da Vinci, Lupin realizes something and rushes to the church where "The Last Supper" is displayed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 4
programme.desc: While shopping with his family, Nyx is shot by someone and loses consciousness. He wakes up bound, and before he is Percival, his boss from his days as MI6.

programme.title: MLB Network Countdown

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Frida y Brandon se reencuentran y Diana toma cartas en el asunto. Kim y Suavecito se besan apasionadamente pero Ian tiene un As bajo la manga. La llegada de un nuevo Ex y alguien es expulsado.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: La Sala Tornado llama a votaciones. Algunos se van de fiesta a una casa flotante. La salida de Daphne se convierte en el pretexto para hacer explotar una bomba de tiempo que provoca una gran pelea.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Una dinámica los obliga a decirse las cosas de frente. Michelle y Kelly arreglan sus diferencias en la Sala Tornado. Salen por grupos a disfrutar de Colombia. Festejan el cumpleaños de Diana.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP
programme.desc: Las vacaciones llegaron a su fin y las relaciones comienzan un nuevo ciclo en un barco a Cartagena. David y Camilo aclaran los malentendidos. Hacen un último brindis todos juntos.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: ¡Celos, arena y mar!
programme.desc: Los influencers más top llegan a Cartagena. Leslie e Isaac se encuentran por primera vez después de conocerse por las redes sociales. Una riña entre Lizbeth y Ana comienza a dividir a los bandos en la villa. El primer ex hace temblar a algunos.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: La manada más salvaje
programme.desc: Lizbeth y Diana se perfilan como las más odiadas del grupo, mientras que el nuevo ex le quita el lugar a Christian. Yurgenis avanza con Brandon y una fiesta salvaje rompe con todo lo que ellos creían de sí mismos.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: De la broma a la guerra
programme.desc: La tablet manda a Ana e Isaac a una cita romántica y Leslie tambalea. La sala tornado abre sus puertas y sus vientos traen muchas dudas. Lizbeth y Diana planean una broma que no termina nada bien. La llegada del próximo ex podría ser devastadora.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: El tiburón tiene colmillo
programme.desc: Los nuevos ex abren las puertas a más problemas. Diana se pone malacopa y amarga la fiesta más dulce. Un tiburón de dos patas visita la villa y lo que parecía un chiste termina siendo una verdadera amenaza. La primera Love Suite es para...

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: Shots con sentimiento
programme.desc: La llegada de Michelle hace arder la villa. La sala tornado pone de cabeza los sentimientos de Leslie. Christian inicia la llama del amor con Andrea mientras que Diana provoca una explosión.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: No soportas, ¿verdad?
programme.desc: Lalo viene a terminar los pendientes con Leslie y a Isaac le toca atacarse. Lizbeth explota contra Isaac y Rufas. Yurgenis se libera en un catamarán, sin la sombra de Brandon. El nuevo ex llega muy salsa, pero de la que no pica.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: El jaque mate
programme.desc: Ana saborea el plato de la venganza, mientras que Leslie se limpia las lágrimas con su orgullo. Un divertido día de playa se convierte en una pesadilla. La llegada del nuevo ex cambia el juego y La Divaza tira los dados cuando no es su turno.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: Veo, veo y no veo claro
programme.desc: La Divaza decide quién debe abandonar la villa. Carolina no controla su ira y le desacomoda las extensiones a Yurgenis. Isaac respeta su condición y va por su próxima conquista. La tablet del terror desata una nueva oleada de discusiones.

programme.title: La venganza de los ex VIP: Aquí se arma la de cantina
programme.desc: Leslie e Isaac se hacen novios. Una discusión provoca que Lizbeth le moje las pestañas a Ali y se desate la guerra. El nuevo ex se lleva la sorpresa de encontrarse con dos ex-amores. Rufas tiene las llaves de la Love Suite.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A twisted tale of blackmail and jury tampering tempts Matlock to defend a young law associate unjustly accused of murder.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Ignoring her father’s warnings, Leanne Mcintyre agrees to defend charismatic philanthropist Gil Stoddard, accused of brutally murdering his business partner.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: After a failed attempt to kidnap Matlock’s daughter, the kidnappers take Matlock’s friend instead! Matlock tries to track down his friend, meanwhile, he’s asked to investigate the kidnapping of an eight-year-old boy.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: While Ben is trying to find his friend who was kidnapped, he realizes that an FBI agent is being framed for that crime and more. Now Ben must free the agent from suspicion of murder.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: What begins as a simple home burglary evolves into a very strange series of events for professional thief Kevin Gilliam.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The church choir hits a sour note when parishioner Wally McDaniels, is accused of murder. McDaniels turns to fellow choir member Ben Matlock to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Amidst the beauty of a luxurious island mansion, a mystery game for charity quickly evolves into a puzzling murder when Matlock discovers the victim is really dead!

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A budding friendship between two great lawyers blossoms into animosity when Matlock and District Attorney Brennen square off on a murder trial. Not only does Matlock believe in his client’s innocence, he thinks Brennen might be the one who’s guilty!

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Thanks to Matlock, a struggling private investigator, played by guest star George Peppard, reunites with his long-lost daughter! Together they investigate a mysterious trail of clues to solve the toughest murder case of his career.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Family or not, Matlock regrets agreeing to hold a pre-wedding party for his bride-to-be goddaughter. Fights among the many freeloading guests have left his home in shambles and an old family feud has escalated into murder!

programme.desc: When young attorney Samuel J. Haskins argues his case in court, it's clear he's copying the unusual style of his idol, Ben Matlock. This is flattering until Sam and his girlfriend get tangled up in a blackmail and murder scheme.

programme.desc: When star cricketer Leo Henderson dies during a tournament, the investigation draws Barnaby into a dangerous game with a surprise visitor from his past.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

programme.desc: A Laguna Beach listing forces the Brits to sink-or-swim in a new territory; Josh Flagg struggles to stay focused on a new listing for one of Edith's friends; Josh Altman finds himself at a crossroads.

programme.desc: Still sore, David keeps James out of a deal with a mystery client; Josh Flagg tries to unload a teardown property; Josh Altman strives to win over a new client while enduring pressure from his visiting parents to have children.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Es el día de recoger la basura y Perro no resiste su instinto natural de correr detrás del camión. / Perro quiere ir a Taco Depot, pero lo tienen prohibido.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro corre a la playa y termina contrayendo pulgas. La cura es usar una correa correctiva pero Gato se rehúsa. / Perro se come toda la comida de Gato en un grupo de enfoque de comida, llevando a la creación de comida para Catdog.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Es noche de luna llena y los instintos de Perro están sumamente disparados por lo que intenta resistir la tentación de correr con el grupo salvaje. / Gato comienza a etiquetar sus pertenencias para evitar que Perro las destruya.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Gato comienza a entrenar para a enfrentarse a Los Grasosos después de que le quitaran su disco volador. / Perro se vuelve apegado a un muñeco de juguete y decide llamarlo Pequeño Gato.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Gato molesta a Perro por su miedo a las películas de terror, pero luego le empieza a dar miedo a él también. / Cansado de que las cosas no se hagan como él quiere, Gato decide contratar a un cochino para que sea parte de CatDog.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Mientras los perros grasos están preparando una trampa para CatDog, una ardilla accidentalmente se pega a la espalda de Cliff. /Debido a la escasez de fondos, CatDog opta por no intercambiar regalos en el “Día del hermano” este año.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: En camino a sus vacaciones tropicales, Perro y Gato quedan varados en la mitad de una autopista muy congestionada. / Gato salva a Lube de una pulga, por lo que Lube le promete lealtad a Gato y promete protegerlo de todo mal.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Tito y Gato hacen una fiesta el mismo día, pero todos los invitados, incluyendo a Perro, se van a la fiesta de Tito debido a la mala comida y aburridos juegos que hizo Gato. / Gato entrena a Perro para que corra en una competencia.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: En la pelea por un inmenso diamante, CatDog crea un terremoto y deben trabajar juntos para escapar de los túneles que están a punto de colapsar. / Mientras se divierte en un basurero de la ciudad Perro encuentra una cucaracha herida.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Tito le cuenta a Gato un secreto que Shriek está enamorada de Perro. Gato ve una oportunidad para tener de su lado a los Grasosos. / Perro y Gato consiguieron trabajo como lamedores en una compañía de cereal.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Cuando Perro desobedece las normas de la piscina de la comunidad, él y Gato son arrestados por el guardavidas y los llevan a prisión. / Gato se ve consumido al coleccionar figuras. A medida que su colección crece las figuras le hablan.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: ¿Es el final de Gato y Perro? Cansados de ser un dos cabezas, Gato decide hacerse una cirugía para separarse de Perro. / Perro y Gato una vez más corren por sus vidas de los Perros Grasosos hacia la seguridad de su casa.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: La amiga sueca de Cat, Ingrid, viene a visitarlo. Sin embargo, esto podría ser un problema, una vez que haya ocultado la verdad acerca de CatDog. El nuevo cartero llega y le entrega las cartas antes de que Dog pueda perseguirlo.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Al darse cuenta de que solo tiene una vida a diferencia de las nueve vidas de Gato, Perro se pone obsesivo con la seguridad. /Cansado de los modos paternales de Gato, Perro se escapa de la casa.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Aparecen nuevos vecinos extraños en la casa de enfrente y Perro, obsesionado con los cómics de ciencia ficción, cree que son alienígenas. / Luego de estar despiertos toda la noche, Perro se queda dormido en el día durante una entrevista.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Gato audiciona para la producción musical de Abe Lincoln: superestrella, pero es abatido cuando Perro obtiene el papel principal y él tiene que ser el burro. /Perro descubre que otro canino violó su toma de agua preferida.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro está abatido al saber que sus huesos de leche preferidos están prohibidos en Nearburg, mientras que Gato tiene una idea para ganar dinero. / Perro come demasiados pasteles de nuez y comienza a crecerle un árbol de nuez en la cabeza.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato tienen la misión de encontrar a la Ardilla que arruinó los vegetales de Gato y robó los huesos de Perro. / Perro vuelve a sus viejos trucos, esta vez, persiguiendo a un avión que está aterrizando en el Aeropuerto.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Gato saca un libro viejo de los gatos en la historia, para enseñarle a Perro sobre la realeza felina en Egipto. / Tito encuentra a Gato en el acto de querer leer el diario de Perro y lo chantajea, convirtiéndolo así en su esclavo personal.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: El frustrado gato, compra videos educativos para su perro / Winslow se despierta una mañana y se entera de que CatDog ha abandonado su casa.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: En un esfuerzo por conseguir que Perro la mire, Shriek, la perra grasosa, va a la escuela de encantos de Randolph. / Perro, sin darse cuenta, salva a Rancio, el conejo, de ser aplastado por la hamburguesa más grande del mundo.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro se agarra de su barrilete mientras va volando, arrastrando a Gato con él, el barrilete vuela sobre el océano y cae sobre una isla. / Perro y Gato forman una banda de rock para poder competir en la Batalla de Bandas de Nearburg.

programme.title: One Piece

programme.desc: Miss Rabbit lends Peppa and her family a plane for the day, and they get swept off on an adventure around the world; the family visits a castle; when Miss Rabbit's train breaks down, Grandpa Pig lends her his little train, Gertrude.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle gets Peppa and her playgroup friends to dance to all different styles of music; for their school project, Peppa and her friends build castles and bring them into playgroup.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Mummy Pig and Daddy Pig go to visit the Kangaroo family in Australia and get to explore the Outback.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle and the playgroup share their best nursery rhymes; Mummy and Daddy Pig take Peppa and George to Digger World, where they build walls and knock them over again.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Pig is determined that George's new hat does not get muddy when Peppa and George visit Grandpa and Granny Pig.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George go sailing with Grandpa Pig, but he keeps getting the boat stuck in the mud; they all decide to have a sleepover on the boat while they wait for the tide to come back in.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and family go on a trip to Paris to meet Delphine Donkey and her family; the Donkey family take Peppa and family to the top of the Eiffel Tower, forcing Daddy Pig to face his fear of heights.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and friends try to decide what they might like to be when they grow up; in the playgroup, there are nurses, police officers, and even pirates.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa teases George; Mummy Pig makes pancakes; Peppa and George hear a strange noise; Daddy Pig gets a new movie camera; Peppa's friends ride their bicycles.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Daddy Pig throws a Halloween costume party; everyone gathers their pumpkins for a pumpkin competition; the family visits a castle; Gerald Giraffe makes friends; Peppa and George stay up late to hunt for slugs and snails.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: Perry Mason defends a policeman charged with slaying his sister's tormentor.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: Perry Mason goes behind the Berlin Wall to defend a woman accused of murdering an East German agent.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: The murder of a trusted employee of Tryon Industries leads Perry Mason into the clandestine world of industrial espionage.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: The reluctant partner of a shady exploiter of glamour faces a murder charge when his associate is slain.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: A woman falls victim to a bizarre murder and a neighbor's "eyewitness" testimony seems to doom Mason's client.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: A man is shot to death while his vast radio audience, including Perry Mason, listens in horror.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: Perry Mason faces a set of mysteries: a private plane crash, a missing drug supply, and a millionaire leading a double life.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: A professional golfer is murdered following his biggest victory and the young opponent he defeated is charged with the crime.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: Perry Mason defends an art gallery owner and his attractive Girl Friday twice accused of murder.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: An art patroness is slain and the young musician she befriended is charged with the crime.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: After his car is broken into, Perry Mason give a teenage criminal a second chance until the teen is charged with murder.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: An international jewel thief is murdered and a gem authority in South America is charged with the crime.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: Two women switch identities: one to recover the $50,000 she is suspected of stealing and the other to elude a paid assassin.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: A ruthless oil tycoon is slain and the young geologist he betrayed is charged with the crime.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank are picking their way through Florida when they get a lead on a potential gold mine -- a five-acre property that's an automotive graveyard.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys uncover a once-in-a-lifetime find, and must decide to go big or go home. Mike gets down-and-dirty to rescue an old piece from Mother Nature.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike's hurt his back but can't afford time off to recuperate. The guys dive into a 92-year-old Iowa farmer's unbelievable collection but make a huge mistake in the process.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank comb through a master collector's untouched outbuildings in North Carolina. After getting past a few petrified hams they find a true gem, a 1950 Studebaker that Mike falls in love with.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike and Frank get revved up about an awesome new client: North Carolina's NASCAR Hall of Fame. The curators have asked them to scour the country for relics that help tell the unique history of auto racing.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In West Virginia, the guys find an old general store that had a lot of Hatfield customers around the time of the legendary feud between the Hatfields & McCoys. There are a few artifacts with the Hatfields name, but are they authentic?

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys make a return visit to fan favorite Hobo Jack's sprawling forest sanctuary in Illinois. But wading through his "junkalanche" proves easier than making a deal.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: When Corey has a chance to buy an extremely rare Belgium-made 1942 Sarolea motorcycle, Rick has a big concern...making money.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars fire off to the shooting range to check out an antique signal cannon from the 1980's TV series Magnum P.I. Will the guys bring out the big guns.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars go off-roading as they look to buy a 1973 Jeep CJ5. Will the gang navigate through rough terrain to make a deal or will they lose traction and get stuck?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars seek counsel when the business card of the infamous Old Western outlaw turned-lawyer John Wesley Hardin moseys into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: It's clear that this is no ordinary pawn shop as the Pawn Stars wheel and deal items ranging from an old school Pac-Man to a Medieval Jousting Helmet.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Make sweet music with the Pawn Stars as they check out a 1763 Stradivarius violin. Found in an attic, could this violin play a tune worth a million bucks or will this deal hit a sour note?

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Where's the Fire?
programme.desc: The guys look to make deals on a beautifully restored 1929 Ford fire engine, a vintage Easy-Bake oven from the early 1970s that still works and 170 rooms of hotel furniture from the famous Bentley Hotel.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Pair of Jokers
programme.desc: The guys bid on a timepiece once owned by Elvis and Joker returns to the shop with a furry friend to hunt down a deal.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Shotgun Bowling
programme.desc: The gang tries to score some strikes with a shotgun on their day at the range.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Jimmie's Last Stand
programme.desc: The guys head out to the old west where a customer brings in a rare Lone Ranger collection.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Bird Brains
programme.desc: The Cajun Pawns Stars chase down a deal on some mischievous peacocks.

programme.title: Cajun Pawn Stars: Springing Forward
programme.desc: The Cajun Pawn Stars call for backup when a pristine 1866 Springfield Trapdoor rifle looks too good to be true.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: With his wife by his side, a self-confessed Tennessee hoarder is motivated to clear out his jam-packed log cabin home, and the showstopper is a 1947 Harley Knucklehead. When a restoration junkie's gas pumps are off-limits, Mike changes gears.

programme.title: Skyfall
programme.desc: Daniel Craig is back as James Bond and his loyalty to MI6 leader M (Judi Dench) is tested as her past returns to haunt her. 007 must track down and destroy the threat, no matter how personal the cost. Javier Bardem and Ralph Fiennes also star.

programme.title: No Time To Die
programme.desc: A mission to rescue a kidnapped scientist turns out to be far more treacherous than expected, leading Bond (Daniel Craig) onto the trail of a mysterious villain armed with dangerous new technology.

programme.title: Thunderball
programme.desc: Sean Connery is back as James Bond, hired to prevent madmen from exploding a nuclear device near picturesque Nassau in this explosive thriller which earned an Oscar for its special visual effects.

programme.title: You Only Live Twice
programme.desc: Sean Connery stars as James Bond in this special-effects spectacular that takes him to Japan to foil an evil plot involving the onset of a nuclear war between the Russians and Americans.

programme.title: On Her Majesty's Secret Service
programme.desc: Just as Agent 007 finally discovers true love, he is thrown into spectacular action and danger in this entertaining adventure that stars George Lazenby as the charismatic Bond.

programme.title: Diamonds Are Forever
programme.desc: Sean Connery stars as the dynamic 007, on the trail of a diamond smuggler who leads him on a nerve-shattering chase through Amsterdam, Los Angeles and eventually, glittery Las Vegas.

programme.title: 007: Los diamantes son eternos
programme.desc: Una fortuna de diamantes robados pone a James Bond en acción nuevamente. En esta emocionante aventura, Sean Connery regresa como el Agente 007 y hace equipo con la bella Tiffany Case.

programme.title: Casino Royale (2006)
programme.desc: Basada en la primera novela de 007 de Ian Fleming, James Bond (Daniel Craig) enfrenta un desafío mortal: evitar que Le Chiffre, un peligroso banquero, gane un juego de póker multimillonario y utilice sus ganancias para financiar el terrorismo global.

programme.title: 007 Quantum
programme.desc: En una búsqueda incansable de justicia que atraviesa el mundo, Bond (Daniel Craig) descubre una compleja conspiración de la misteriosa organización Quantum para tomar el control de uno de los recursos naturales más importantes del planeta.

programme.title: 007: Operación Skyfall
programme.desc: Daniel Craig regresa como James Bond, y su lealtad hacia M (Judi Dench), líder de MI6, es puesta a prueba cuando su pasado regresa para atormentarla. El agente 007 debe rastrear y destruir la amenaza, sin importar el costo personal.

programme.title: Sin tiempo para morir
programme.desc: Una misión de rescate para salvar a un científico secuestrado se complica más de lo previsto, llevando a Bond (Daniel Craig) a enfrentarse a un enigmático villano equipado con tecnología de última generación.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
programme.desc: John Rambo is sent on assignment back to Southeast Asia to uncover evidence of still missing POWs, and ends up with his hands full when he comes up against Vietnamese soldiers still guarding the camps.

programme.title: Rambo III
programme.desc: Rambo refuses to join his friend and former mentor, Colonel Trautman, on a mission to Afghanistan. The mission fails and Trautman is captured by Russian troops. Now Rambo must infiltrate the Russian fortress to save his only friend.

programme.title: The Expendables
programme.desc: A tight-knit team of skilled combat vets turned mercenaries, set out to save the innocent and punish the guilty in this blistering action-packed thriller.

programme.title: The Expendables 2
programme.desc: Barney and his mercenaries race to stop five tons of weapons-grade plutonium from falling into the wrong hands in this all-star, action-packed sequel.

programme.title: The Expendables 3
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone stars in this explosive thrill-ride. When The Expendables face an old rival, it's a clash of old-school versus high-tech in the most personal battle yet.

programme.title: Escape Plan
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone, Arnold Schwarzenegger, and 50 Cent star as inmates who must break out of a top secret, high-security prison in this non-stop action-thriller.

programme.title: Death Note: Doubt
programme.desc: L's suspicion of Light deepens, compelling him to invite Light into the investigation.

programme.title: Death Note: Assault
programme.desc: As predicted on the tapes sent to Sakura TV, news anchors and commentators who expressed doubt about Kira die one by one.

programme.title: Death Note: Love
programme.desc: With a second Kira now on the loose, L asks Light to join the task force and pose as the real Kira in order to catch the copycat.

programme.title: Death Note: Confession
programme.desc: Light goes to Aoyama to discover the identity of the second Kira before L becomes more suspicious.

programme.title: Death Note: Friend
programme.desc: Light and Misa show each other their Death Notes, and Light asks Misa to have her shinigami Rem get rid of L.

programme.title: Death Note: Wager
programme.desc: Evidence turns up that points to Misa Amane as the second Kira.

programme.title: Death Note: Decision
programme.desc: Misa is in confinement, though her memories of the Death Note have been completely wiped away.

programme.title: Death Note: Execution
programme.desc: After fifty days of confinement the killings continue, and Misa and Light are released.

programme.title: Death Note: Ally
programme.desc: Though L is still suspicious, Light and Misa, their memories of being Kira wiped clean, return to headquarters….

programme.title: Death Note: Matsuda
programme.desc: Matsuda, the task force member assigned to watch Misa, is eager to distinguish himself.

programme.title: Death Note: Makeshift
programme.desc: L's team discovers that the Yotsuba Group meet in secret to discuss the elimination of individuals who are troublesome to their company….

programme.title: Death Note: Performance
programme.desc: The Yotsuba Group hires Eraldo Coil to uncover L's identity.

programme.title: Death Note: Guidance
programme.desc: Misa succeeds in narrowing down the Kira suspects in the Yotsuba Group to one: Higuchi.

programme.title: Death Note: Frenzy
programme.desc: Higuchi of the Yotsuba Group attempts to kill Matsuda of the task force, and is surprised when he doesn't die after 40 seconds.

programme.title: Death Note: Revival
programme.desc: Higuchi is captured and tells the investigators about the Death Note.

programme.title: Death Note: Silence
programme.desc: Light, his memory recovered, orders Misa to begin killing after Higuchi dies.

programme.title: Death Note: Renewal
programme.desc: Light has removed everyone in his way and is closer to achieving his perfect world.

programme.title: Death Note: Abduction
programme.desc: A new investigator steps forward, Near, a central figure in the SPK, an organization that is trying to catch Kira without relying on L.

programme.title: Death Note: Impatience
programme.desc: Light, acting as L, reveals to Near that his sister Sayu has been kidnapped by someone wanting to trade her for the Death Note.

programme.title: Death Note: Father
programme.desc: Light tries to discover where Mello and his Mafia associates are hiding and uses Misa's eyes to find the Death Note's current owner.

programme.title: Death Note: Justice
programme.desc: Mello busts into SPK headquarters to retrieve a photograph of himself to make sure he won't be killed by Kira.

programme.title: Death Note: Transfer
programme.desc: Near contacts the Japanese task force and determines that Kira is among their members.

programme.title: Death Note: Selection
programme.desc: Star newscaster Kiyomi Takada becomes Kira's spokesperson to the world.

programme.title: Death Note: Scorn
programme.desc: Light pretends to investigate Kiyomi.

programme.title: Death Note: Vigilance
programme.desc: Aizawa figures out what's going on and tells Near, who already knows about the notes.

programme.title: Death Note: Malice
programme.desc: Light gives Kiyomi the order to finish off Near.

programme.title: Death Note: 1.28
programme.desc: Near, along with the SPK, meets Light and the task force at a warehouse for the final showdown.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Yuri Shibuya, an average 15-year-old Japanese high school student, is suddenly transported to another world where he is now the king of demons! However, getting used to this new life isn't as easy as one thinks...

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: After a heated exchange over an insult to his mother, Yuri discovers he's mistakenly proposed marriage... to Lord Wolfram!

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: When Gwendal and Conrad go off to protect a village under attack, Yuri learns the truth of the battle and resolves to become the Demon King to put an end to the fighting.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Having returned to Earth, Yuri resumes his normal life and returns to baseball practice, while his mother reminisces about the past.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: While enjoying a party at sea during a trip to Van Da Via Island, the ship is attacked by pirates, forcing Yuri to unleash his magic once again...

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Arriving on Van Da Via Island, Yuri and the others hear of a tale of a cursed hot spring and believe it could be where they'll find Morgif, the Demon Sword.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Josak fools Yuri into a fight to the death to power up Morgif by absorbing souls, but his opponent is Rick, the young apprentice from the ship!

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: With Yuri back on Earth once more, Stoffel, former regent to the previous Demon Queen, begins to hatch a plan to demonstrate how much Yuri will need him.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: As morning comes, everything appears quiet despite the commotion the night before, but it is soon discovered that the gem of the Dragon King was stolen from the crown in the treasure room!

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Stoffel and Raven begin the next phase of their plan when Yuri investigates the theft of the gem, forcing Conrad and Wolfram to come to his rescue!

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Having captured Yuri, Stoffel tries to convince him to join his side, but Josak sneaks him out as two armies prepare for battle...

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: While on a trip to find an imposter Demon King, Yuri, Conrad, and Wolfram come across Gwendal, and an encounter with a Sand Bear separates the group into two pairs.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Arriving in Svelera, Yuri and Gwendal meet a runaway bride who reveals she has the Demon Flute, but when Yuri tries to use it, it doesn't work!

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Gwendal and Yuri are put on trial over their \\"relationship\\" and when Yuri is unable to harm Gwendal to save himself, he is sentenced to hard labor in a mine filled with esoteric stones that suppress demon magic.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: With Norika reunited with her son, Yuri discovered the other piece of the Demon Flute and decides to see what it can do.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Yuri heads into a city after hearing of a stolen demon stone, finding in in the hands of a poor family that have been using it to earn money for food, leading Yuri to decide to help them out.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: After announcing her intention to marry Raven, Celi's past and her connection to Raven and Stoffel is revealed, while Yuri and the others are invited to a celebration.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: The castle's guest house has been taken over by monsters, so Yuri, who wants to get a night of peace away from Wolfram, resolves to clear it of the unwanted guests.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Deciding he wants to see a dragon, Yuri sets out with Wolfram, Conrad, and Günter travel to a preserve where they discover dragon poachers, and one of them challenges Yuri to a fight.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: After his defeat in battle, the poacher reveals his name to be Alford, who explains his motivation to fight Yuri while the group makes plans to protect the dragons.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: During a visit from Nicola, someone arrives at the castle claiming to be Yuri's illegitimate child!

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Despite his twisted ankle, Yuri takes Greta into town and gets captured by some thugs, but after being saved by Wolfram and Conrad, they are attacked by a masked man!

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Yuri and the others attend a race between rare animals, where Yuri puts himself on the line against Vullion to restore the freedom of the western area!

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Having returned to the Demon Kingdom, Yuri learns from Gisela what happened twenty years ago with Hube and a woman named Julia...

programme.title: Boruto: Naruto the Movie
programme.desc: Sasuke appears before Naruto to warn him of impending danger. An inconceivable foe lies in wait as Sasuke, the Five Kage and Boruto, charge into another dimension!

programme.desc: A young warrior battles against a city overtaken by demons, one devil at a time. To save Tokyo from evil, he must defeat a sinister psychic from the underworld.

programme.title: Space: The New Frontier: The Dark Side
programme.desc: In terms of the Universe, we know we don't know much, especially when it comes to dark matter and dark energy. Scientists are devoting so much of their time to discovering as much as the possibly can about this mysterious matter.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Virtual Universe
programme.desc: Our understanding of the cosmos is limited by the amount of time we have to see it. Fortunately, computer simulations can help us see how galaxies interact over millions of years, and even how dark matter structures the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Stargazer's Paradise
programme.desc: The Atacama desert is a perfect place for watching the night sky. With still winds and only a handful of cloudy nights each year, it allows scientists to get the absolute most out of their tools.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rainbow
programme.desc: The human eye can only see visible light, a small spectrum of electromagnetic waves. Today, we have instruments that let us perceive all wavelengths.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Milky Way
programme.desc: This episode traces our view of the Milky Way, from the mythology of ancient skywatchers to the efforts of scientists to map it from the inside out.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Colour
programme.desc: Color is essential to both art and astronomy. When measured, it can tell us the temperature, chemical composition, and motion of astronomical objects.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Giant Planets: Lords of Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity is one of the most basic and powerful forces shaping our universe. Discover its nature within our own solar system, from the smallest moons to the largest planets.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Hubble's Renaissance
programme.desc: Before we can reach space, we must first be able to see it. Hundreds of years ago, the simple telescope was used to give us a seemingly closer vantage. Today, we use the awe-inspiring, and super powerful, Hubble Space Telescope.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Superscopes
programme.desc: Discover the most powerful telescopes on the planet as they search for the mysteries of the universe.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rainbow
programme.desc: The human eye can only see visible light, a small spectrum of electromagnetic waves. Today, we have instruments that let us perceive all wavelengths.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Seasons of Saturn
programme.desc: Saturn is the second largest planet and has an astonishing 60 moons in its orbit. Thanks to the Cassini mission, it’s also one of the most studied and most photographed planets in our neighborhood.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Vesta Unveiled
programme.desc: With the Dawn missions exploration of the asteroid Vesta and the dwarf planet Ceres, asteroids are a hot topic. See what these incredible missions have uncovered.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Water Worlds
programme.desc: They key ingredient to life in the universe is water. Until recently we thought Earth was the only place in the solar system to have any water at all. Now that probes are peering around nearby worlds we are finding that is just not the case.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Gravity
programme.desc: Gravity has long been a force that has intrigued scientists. Now, for the first time scientists are probing to detect gravity waves in space as well as mapping the gravity patterns of the moon.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Science and the Shuttle
programme.desc: For more than 25 years the shuttle was our ticket to space, and our laboratory in orbit. Uncover the legacy of this amazing machine, and see what lies ahead.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landing on Mars
programme.desc: Mars sparks our curiosity like no other planet because it is so reachable. Despite having landed there, most of the information we gather is still done by instruments in the planet's orbit.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Milky Way
programme.desc: This episode traces our view of the Milky Way, from the mythology of ancient skywatchers to the efforts of scientists to map it from the inside out.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Big Bang
programme.desc: When it comes to the birth of the universe, not even the most creative work of imagination can rival what science has revealed about the Big Bang.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Hot Zone
programme.desc: Mercury is one of Earth's closest neighbors, but until very recent exploratory missions, it eluded astronomers' best efforts to learn its secrets.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Rays
programme.desc: Cosmic rays can tell us much about the universe. They are not simply another form of light, but carriers of information about powerful and unseen processes at work thousands or even millions of light years away.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Fermi Paradox
programme.desc: The Fermi Paradox asks the ultimate question: why have alien civilizations not presented themselves?

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Landsat
programme.desc: An advanced $900 million planetary explorer designed to peer across multiple wavelengths to reveal intricate details undetectable by the human eye.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Eye of the Beholder
programme.desc: The night sky has always been a source of wonder and mystery. In the quest to explore the universe, our greatest ally is the Hubble telescope.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Painted By Light
programme.desc: When the universe formed, all of space blazed white-hot, but it didn't last. Darkness reined for 200 million years before the light was reborn.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Colour
programme.desc: Color is essential to both art and astronomy. When measured, it can tell us the temperature, chemical composition, and motion of astronomical objects.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Cosmic Perspective
programme.desc: For most of human history, the night sky seemed two-dimensional. To our ancestors, this perspective gave no hint to the universe's true depth.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures

programme.desc: Major Leonard's team fails to check in with Atlantis while on a mission. Following the energy readings in hope of finding Major Leonard and his men, McKay leads the team into a cave to discover that the cause the energy spike is a Wraith generator.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team hear of a great warrior with stories of defeating both the Genii and Wraith and seek him out in hopes of making a new ally. But when they learn this great warrior is none other than Lucius they believe he's up to his old tricks again.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Trying to preserve power by turning off all the non-essential systems the Ancients recently activated before being killed by the replicators, McKay mistakenly is hit by an energy beam from a mysterious device.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Tool marking: A tool used to commit a crime can often be the same tool used to solve it. The pattern a machine leaves on an item, the unusual way a tool crimps a wire, and even something as innocuous as the shape of a wood chip can lead to a killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Men don't have a monopoly on murder, but it's still extraordinary when women kill. Though female killers are as deadly as males, they choose less violent methods.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Botany & Geology: Plants help provide oxygen and nutrients for existence. Soil is the fertilizer of life. Yet both can yield clues to the time and location of a person's death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Ballistic analysis is the key to finding killers who turn guns on their victims. Each shot fired leaves its own “fingerprint”, allowing scientists to target murderers with deadly aim.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Weeks pass as forensic investigators search for even the smallest clues, only to find what they feared in their own backyard. In Canada, two people die suddenly of unknown causes, and their deaths may not be as coincidental as they first appear.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For the forensic entomologist, the insects that nest in dead bodies are like tiny witnesses to a crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When murder becomes a family affair, investigators must turn to forensics to uncover family plots.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A New York homebuyer gets more than he bargained for when a house inspection turns up a mummified corpse. For decades, the crime had gone undiscovered. The victim unmissed, and the killer unpunished.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The forces of nature can reduce a body to bones in a matter of weeks. Using a unique combination of art and science, forensic anthropologists give victims a face long after they have been forgotten.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder, at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their undoing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes killers are careful to leave no fingerprints behind. But methods of the murder itself can leave a lasting impression on police, especially when the tools (or weapons) of a killer's trade leave an innocent victim marked for death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The solution to the most heinous crimes often hinge on the smallest of clues. Investigators must have their eyes trained to find the full story of a murder written in a single scrap of evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some of the best clues come from the least likely places. Baffling crimes have been solved and criminals betrayed through evidence provided by insects, beer bottles, and other seemingly meaningless objects.
